category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Ecuador market (INEN conformity adopting NTE INEN/EN 149, mandatory RTE with Certificate of Conformity, Ministry of Labour/IESS occupational framework; medical masks via ARCSA).

title.en: China-to-Ecuador PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入厄瓜多尔（INEN）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入厄瓜多爾（INEN）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626 / GB 19083) documentation against Ecuador requirements: INEN conformity adopting NTE INEN / EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), the mandatory RTE technical regulation requiring a Certificate of Conformity for regulated products, the Ministry of Labour / IESS occupational safety framework, the role of the local importer, and the boundary that routes medical masks through the national health regulator ARCSA rather than the INEN/labour PPE route.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件与厄瓜多尔要求对照，涵盖INEN采纳NTE INEN/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的合格评定、要求受管制产品提供符合性证书的强制性技术规范（RTE）、劳动部/IESS职业安全框架、本地进口商的角色，以及将医用口罩导向国家卫生监管机构ARCSA（而非INEN/劳动PPE路径）的界定。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件與厄瓜多爾要求對照，涵蓋INEN採納NTE INEN/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的合格評定、要求受管制產品提供符合性證書的強制性技術規範（RTE）、勞動部/IESS職業安全框架、本地進口商的角色，以及將醫用口罩導向國家衛生監管機構ARCSA（而非INEN/勞動PPE路徑）的界定。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Ecuadorian law, INEN technical regulations (RTE), adopted NTE INEN standards, accredited conformity-assessment-body scope, and customs practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The PPE-vs-medical device boundary described herein (INEN/labour route vs ARCSA health route) requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行厄瓜多尔法律、INEN技术规范（RTE）、采纳的NTE INEN标准、认可合格评定机构的范围及海关实践。本文所述的PPE与医疗器械界定（INEN/劳动路径与ARCSA卫生路径）需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行厄瓜多爾法律、INEN技術規範（RTE）、採納的NTE INEN標準、認可合格評定機構的範圍及海關實踐。本文所述的PPE與醫療器械界定（INEN/勞動路徑與ARCSA衛生路徑）需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: FFP respirators entering Ecuador as occupational PPE follow the INEN conformity route: Ecuador adopts NTE INEN standards aligned with EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3) and, for products covered by a mandatory technical regulation (RTE), requires a Certificate of Conformity issued by an accredited conformity-assessment body before the regulated product can be imported and sold. A local importer of record handles customs and the INEN/conformity documentation, and occupational use is framed by the Ministry of Labour and IESS. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not by themselves satisfy the adopted NTE INEN/EN 149 requirements. Critical boundary: medical masks are routed through the national health regulator ARCSA, not the INEN/labour PPE route.
answer_first.zh: 作为职业PPE进入厄瓜多尔的FFP呼吸器遵循INEN合格评定路径：厄瓜多尔采纳与EN 149一致的NTE INEN标准（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3），对于受强制性技术规范（RTE）管辖的产品，须在进口及销售前由认可的合格评定机构出具符合性证书。本地进口商（进口主体）负责海关及INEN/合格评定文件，职业使用由劳动部及IESS框定。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告本身不满足采纳的NTE INEN/EN 149要求。关键界定：医用口罩经国家卫生监管机构ARCSA管理，而非INEN/劳动PPE路径。
answer_first.zht: 作為職業PPE進入厄瓜多爾的FFP呼吸器遵循INEN合格評定路徑：厄瓜多爾採納與EN 149一致的NTE INEN標準（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3），對於受強制性技術規範（RTE）管轄的產品，須在進口及銷售前由認可的合格評定機構出具符合性證書。本地進口商（進口主體）負責海關及INEN/合格評定文件，職業使用由勞動部及IESS框定。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告本身不滿足採納的NTE INEN/EN 149要求。關鍵界定：醫用口罩經國家衛生監管機構ARCSA管理，而非INEN/勞動PPE路徑。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator (INEN, Ministry of Labour, IESS, ARCSA, SENAE), standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs are not accepted as primary sources.
